channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Thai Shelter Supports Trafficking Survivors in Rebuilding Their Lives
item.description: CNN’s report highlights the story of Kat, a teenage survivor of human trafficking who found safety and purpose at the Freedom Home operated by The Exodus Road in northern Thailand. After being rescued...

item.title: Ten Years of B.C.’s Toxic Drug Emergency: Examining the Impact on Public Health
item.description: On April 14, 2016, British Columbia became the first Canadian province to declare toxic drugs a public health emergency in response to rising overdose deaths. In the decade since, over 18,000 people h...

item.title: US-Iran Relations Tighten; Focus Shifts to Potential Conflict and Hollywood's Cinematic Portrayals
item.description: Rising tensions between the United States and Iran continue to escalate, prompting concerns about a potential military conflict. Recent developments indicate heightened diplomatic efforts, including t...

item.title: Man hospitalised after being stabbed several times at home
item.description: Early on Tuesday morning, emergency services responded to a serious stabbing at a private residence where a man had been attacked multiple times. The victim, believed to be in his thirties, was found ...

item.title: Police watchdog probes officers' conduct in Wimbledon crash that killed two schoolgirls
item.description: The Independent Office for Police Conduct (IOPC) is investigating complaints against 11 officers regarding their handling of the inquiry into a tragic car crash in Wimbledon that resulted in the death...

item.title: Zanzibar Government Supports Youth Innovation for Digital Economy Growth
item.description: The Zanzibar government is actively promoting youth-led innovation and technology as a key strategy for job creation, digital economic growth, and enhancing global competitiveness. Mr. Mudrik Ramadhan...

item.title: Trump Criticizes Pope Leo XIV on Crime and Nuclear Weapons Stance
item.description: President Donald Trump don yan say e no be fan of Pope Leo XIV after the Pope call for calmness and diplomacy regarding the tension between the United States and Iran over nuclear weapons. Trump tok s...

item.title: Cape Town Tackles Electric Minibus Taxi Transition: Challenges and Opportunities
item.description: Cape Town is gearing up to embrace electric minibus taxis, a vital component of the city's public transport system. These taxis, commonly known as 'taxis', are relied upon by approximately two-thirds ...

item.title: Ramil Madriaga testifies on allegations against VP Sara Duterte and former President Duterte
item.description: On April 14, 2026, Ramil Madriaga, claiming to be the former bagman of Vice President Sara Duterte, testified before the House justice committee regarding impeachment complaints filed against the Vice...

item.title: Imran Khan’s Sisters Reach Adiala Jail but Meeting Still Blocked
item.description: On Tuesday, the sisters of former Prime Minister Imran Khan reached Adiala jail in Islamabad with the hope of meeting their brother, but were denied entry by the authorities. Typically, police stop th...

item.title: Fréchette Outlines Priorities: Tackling Cost of Living in Quebec
item.description: Premier-designate Christine Fréchette has officially begun her tenure, marking her first day with a news conference at the National Assembly. She’s prioritized addressing the rising cost of living for...

item.title: Nigeria Calls for Fair Global Financial Support Amid Global Market Turmoil
item.description: For the IMF–World Bank Spring Meetings 2026 wey dey happen between 13 to 18 April, Nigeria don raise voice say the global economy dey shake because of Middle East crisis. The Minister of Finance, Wale...

item.title: Elderly Woman Battles Gambling Addiction Amid Illness and Poverty
item.description: A woman known as WA, living in Nairobi's Pipeline Estate, has opened up about her long struggle with gambling addiction that began in 2017. Initially drawn by curiosity, she started betting on sports ...

item.title: Investors re-evaluate traditional 60/40 investment strategies amid stagflation and global conflict
item.description: The long-standing 60/40 investment principle, which allocates 60 per cent to equities and 40 per cent to bonds, is under significant strain as global economic conditions deteriorate. With oil prices s...

item.title: Pareesh Rawal confirms 'Hera Pheri' sequel is underway
item.description: Actor Pareesh Rawal has confirmed that the long-awaited sequel to the popular Indian comedy film 'Hera Pheri,' featuring Yash and Ranbir Kapoor, is indeed in the works. Fans have been eagerly anticipa...

item.title: Limpopo mother calls for answers, healthcare support and housing assistance for child with cerebral palsy
item.description: A Limpopo mother, Andronicca Rasebotsa from Mphame Village in the Greater Tzaneen Local Municipality, is calling for clearer medical explanations, better healthcare services and improved social suppor...

item.title: McIlroy Wins 2024 Masters, Continues Legacy at Augusta
item.description: Rory McIlroy secured his second Masters Tournament title on Sunday, overcoming a challenging leaderboard and demonstrating remarkable composure throughout the final round. The victory marks a signific...

item.title: Nigerian Army loses Colonel and soldiers in Boko Haram ambush during reinforcement mission in Borno
item.description: A Nigerian Army senior officer, Colonel I.A. Muhammad, alongside several soldiers, has been killed in a Boko Haram ambush in Monguno, Borno State. The incident happened after insurgents launched a coo...

item.title: Tanzania-Comoros trade imbalance presents opportunities for exporters and investors
item.description: Dar es Salaam: Tanzania and Comoros are experiencing a significant trade imbalance that could become a driver for new business opportunities. From 2023 to 2025, Tanzania exported goods worth 48.85 mil...
